embeds.title: 🎲 Gamble with UNLIMITED Friends
embeds.description: Raises the **Gamble With Your Friends** lobby cap from **6 → 12 players**, and fixes large-lobby issues (players stuck in the spawn box, low starting money on new saves).

fields.name: ✅ What You Need
fields.value:
- **Gamble With Your Friends** on PC
- **BepInEx 5.x**
- The mod file: `TwelvePlayerExpansion.dll`

fields.name: 📥 Step 1 — Install BepInEx
fields.value: Download [**BepInEx 5.x (win x64)**](https://github.com/BepInEx/BepInEx/releases/download/v5.4.23.5/BepInEx_win_x64_5.4.23.5.zip) and extract its contents into your **Gamble With Your Friends** game folder (the same folder as the game's `.exe`).

fields.name: ▶️ Step 2 — Run the Game Once
fields.value: Launch the game normally, then close it. This lets BepInEx generate its folders — afterwards you should see a `BepInEx` folder in your game directory.

fields.name: 📂 Step 3 — Install the Mod
fields.value:
Download the mod → [**TwelvePlayerExpansion.dll**](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/XevioQwerty/discord-direct/main/downloads/TwelvePlayerExpansion.dll)

Place it in:
```
Gamble With Your Friends/BepInEx/plugins/
```
If the `plugins` folder doesn't exist, create it.

fields.name: 🎮 Step 4 — Launch & Verify
fields.value:
Start the game. If the mod loaded, the BepInEx console/log shows:
```
12-Player Expansion: Parent Hook Applied
```

fields.name: 🌐 Own the Real Game? Play With Us
fields.value:
Using the cracked copy? **Skip this** — the online-fix is already built in, just play.

This is **only for people who own the game on Steam** and want to join our lobbies (online-fix is a separate P2P network, so owners need it too):
1. Download → [**Online-Fix .zip**](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/XevioQwerty/discord-direct/main/downloads/online-fix/gamble-with-friends-online-fix.zip)
2. Grab the [**toggle script**](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/XevioQwerty/discord-direct/main/downloads/online-fix/OnlineFix-Toggle.bat), put it in your game folder, make an `_OnlineFix` subfolder and extract the zip into it.
3. Run it → press **S** → makes **(Online Fix)** & **(Normal)** shortcuts.
-# Launch **(Online Fix)** to play with us, **(Normal)** for real Steam.

fields.name: 🔧 What the Mod Does
fields.value:
- Raises lobby size **6 → 12 players**
- Patches Steam lobby + Mirror networking limits
- Updates internal max-player settings
- Scales starting money on new saves
- Fixes the spawn-box soft-lock
- Adds log messages so you can confirm it's working

fields.name: 👥 Important Notes
fields.value: The limit is mainly enforced by the **host**, but for best results **everyone should install the mod** — it avoids lobby/networking bugs in bigger groups.

fields.name: ❌ If It Doesn't Work
fields.value:
1. BepInEx is in the correct game folder.
2. You ran the game once after installing BepInEx.
3. The DLL is inside `BepInEx/plugins/`.
4. The file is named exactly `TwelvePlayerExpansion.dll`.
5. The log shows `12-Player Expansion: Parent Hook Applied`.
-# No log line = the mod didn't load.
